title: viola × teriana
intro: Viola × teriana, also known as Violetroot or Yellow Violet, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Violet family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Viola × teriana include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, and is also used in homeopathy to treat a range of health conditions.
